recipe.title: Friday: Turkey Veggie Meatballs with Sweet Potatoes & Avocado Yogurt Dip
ingredients: 3 large sweet potatoes, cut into wedges
**Avocado Yogurt Dip:** 2 ripe avocados, 1 cup plain Greek yogurt, juice of 1 lime, pinch cumin, salt
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a sheet pan with parchment.
Combine turkey, zucchini, carrots, spinach, breadcrumbs, eggs, garlic, onion powder, paprika, pepper in a large bowl. Mix until just combined — don't overwork.
Form into 1.5-inch meatballs (about 24). Place on one half of the sheet pan. Lightly spray with olive oil.
On the other half, toss sweet potato wedges with olive oil, cinnamon, and a pinch of salt.
Bake 25–30 minutes, flipping sweet potatoes halfway, until meatballs reach 165°F internal and sweet potatoes are tender and caramelized.
**Avocado Yogurt Dip:** Mash or blend avocados with yogurt, lime juice, cumin, and salt until smooth. Chill until serving.
Serve meatballs with sweet potato wedges and a generous dollop of dip.
